run: cd wlcreator && sudo gcc -o wlcreator wlcreator.c && ./wlcreator 5

password-tools.title: Password list (1.4 Billion Clear Text Password)
password-tools.description: This tool allows you to perform OSINT and reconnaissance on an organisation or an individual. It allows one to search 1.4 Billion clear text credentials which was dumped as part of BreachCompilation leak. This database makes finding passwords faster and easier than ever before.

password-tools.title: Hashcat (Password Cracker)
password-tools.description:
World's fastest GPU/CPU password recovery tool — supports 300+ hash types.
Usage: hashcat -m 0 -a 0 hashes.txt wordlist.txt

password-tools.title: John the Ripper
password-tools.description:
Open-source password security auditing and recovery tool.
Usage: john --wordlist=wordlist.txt hashfile

password-tools.title: haiti (Hash Type Identifier)
password-tools.description:
Identify hash types — supports 300+ algorithms.
Usage: haiti <hash>
